description: Style NoteCreated for today's generation, this spinn Castro shoe embodies the brand's motto - combining technology and high-octane fashion. We think these are just right for braving the urban jungle, thanks to their nonchalantly sturdy aesthetic. An all-weather staple, the style perfectly suits the cosmopolitan vibe you love!Product DetailsRound toed casual shoe in beige and blue with an upraised heel and lace-up fasteningSynthetic and leather upper with nubuck overlaysWell padded collar and tongue (with branding)Foam midsoleNon-marking rubber outsole with grooves all overOutsole reinforced onto the upper at the heel to act as a heel guardMaterial and CareSynthetic and leatherDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
